'''Krinemonen''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]<ref name="SR:33" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Krinemonen III]].

==History==
One of the [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari Shipyards]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Krinemonen III]].<ref name="G8">{{GamerCite|8|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Priapulin}}</ref>

The [[Krinemonen system/Legends|Krinemonen system]] was destroyed by the [[Galaxy Gun]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|153|Unstated Canon in Star Wars: The Essential Atlas}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
